narrative:
Ballville Township has 4,513 registered voters, with 48.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.0 percentage points.
